  • PyC Package
  • Tools Module (PyC)
  • View page source

Tools Module (PyC)

Utility functions for PyC package.

Overview

Located in pyc/pyc/tools/, this module provides utilities for data handling, I/O, and conversions.

Key Functions

I/O Operations

import pyc.tools as tools

# Read data
data = tools.read_file("data.bin")

# Write data
tools.write_file("output.bin", data)

Type Conversions

# Convert between types
tensor = tools.list_to_tensor([1, 2, 3, 4])
list_data = tools.tensor_to_list(tensor)

String Utilities

# String operations
encoded = tools.encode_string("text")
decoded = tools.decode_string(encoded)

See Also

  • Physics Module (PyC) - Physics calculations

  • Operators Module (PyC) - Tensor operations
